reviews.comment:
No tienen ni una opción de almuerzo sin gluten, no respetan la ley. Haré la denuncia correspondiente a atención al consumidor.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a single gluten-free lunch option; they're not complying with the law. I will be filing a complaint with consumer protection.

reviews.comment:
no cargue combustible! pero pare en la área de descanso muy espaciosa y cómoda! los baños bastantes aceptables!

(Translated by Google)
Don't refuel! But stop at the very spacious and comfortable rest area! The restrooms are quite acceptable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tjM1gyMXJOVFV6TWtZNFVXZE5hM0k0WVY5YWIxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando viajo a la Patagonia, tanto de ida, como de regreso, es mi estación de servicio preferida por varias razones, la excelente atención de los chicos y chicas de la playa y del bar, el amplísimo espacio arbolado con que cuentan y los productos siempre de primera, además de la limpieza y aseo de los baños, impecable. Les sugeriría únicamente que vean para incorporar al menos un par de duchas para los viajeros y conductores, ya que luego de largas y agotadoras jornadas de ruta, darse una ducha siempre es algo que reconforta. Por lo demás, mis mas sinceras felicitaciones!☺️

(Translated by Google)
When I travel to Patagonia, both going and coming back, this is my favorite service station for several reasons: the excellent service from the attendants and the bar staff, the spacious, wooded area, and the consistently top-quality products. Plus, the restrooms are impeccably clean. My only suggestion would be to consider adding at least a couple of showers for travelers and drivers, as after long and tiring days on the road, a shower is always refreshing. Otherwise, my sincerest congratulations! ☺️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWdVlVSmhUVVZ2YTBGclkxbFJWRVo1UVRKV1ltYxAB

reviews.comment:
Mejor atención de la zona y se hinflan los neumáticos a todo gas, una masa

(Translated by Google)
Better service in the area and they inflate the tires really fast, awesome
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyaVBHSGlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentable, la máquina de agua caliente no funcionaba, y no tienen voluntad en la cocina de calentar con una pava eléctrica. El playero se negó a limpiar el parabrisas. Dicen que la gente del interior es amable y servicial, éstos son la excepción.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the hot water machine wasn't working, and they weren't willing to heat water with an electric kettle in the kitchen. The attendant refused to clean the windshield. They say people from the interior are friendly and helpful; these people are the exception.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xvd1VEVmZMVVZJVlRoRGRWb3hhME0wY2pNNVdYYxAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad pésima la atención de la Ypf full de trenque Lauquen ni un vaso me dieron ni sorbete compré combos para mis hijas y nunca tienen los juguetes y te cobran igual la promoción ! Además de que se llena de gente y tienen un solo personal . Soy transportista por lo cual compro siempre en las Ypf de otros lados y nada que ver la atención

(Translated by Google)
The service at the YPF Full in Trenque Lauquen was truly awful. They didn't even give me a cup or a straw! I bought combo meals for my daughters, and they never had the toys, yet they still charged me the full price for the promotion! Plus, it's always packed, and they only have one employee. I'm a truck driver, so I always shop at YPF stations in other areas, and the service is nothing like it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSa2EzcE1SMGRvVUdaYWMzbEtkUzFUUW5kUVYwRRAB

reviews.comment:

Nadie tiene información de nada.
Pocos productos en el full market.
No tienen AGUA SIN GAS! Y te dicen: yo no me hago cargo de los pedidos!

(Translated by Google)
Incredibly slow service!
Nobody has any information.
Very few products at the full market.
They don't have still water! And they tell you: "I'm not responsible for orders!"

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención del playero, no dijo buen día (pese a que lo saludé), muy mala onda...
Los baños de mujer estaban cerrados, solo estaba habilitado el de hombres y el Full estaba cerrado, no se podía comprar nada pese a ser un domingo a las 8.00 hs.
Sinceramente no vuelvo a parar en esta estación.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant was terrible; he didn't even say good morning (even though I greeted him), and he was very unfriendly. The women's restrooms were closed; only the men's restroom was open, and the convenience store was closed. You couldn't buy anything, even though it was Sunday at 8:00 AM. Honestly, I'm never stopping at this station again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSeFkybE9lWFJUWTA4dExVZEJMV3RXZVc1aVEyYxAB
